stateRequirement.eligibilityGroups: Eligibility pathways for Georgia: , Pregnant Individuals, Blind, disabled, aged, former foster care, Older Children (Ages 6-18), Young Children (Ages 1-5), Parents and Caretakers, higher income children

message.text: Set household size to the total count of individuals in the household = 2
Calculated Lisle's age from number of years between today and their date of birth [1977-10-30] = 48
Calculated Stanislas's age from number of years between today and their date of birth [2005-10-30] = 20
Set household's annual income by summing the monthly income for all individuals in the household and multiplying by 12 = $ 69155.28
Household state is [Georgia] and size is [2], setting poverty guideline to [21150]
For the Infants (0-1) group  in [Georgia], set the MAGI income multiplier to [2.1] and the funding source to [Medicaid].
For the Pregnant Individuals group in [Georgia], set the MAGI income multiplier to [2.25] and the funding source to [Medicaid].
For the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) group, set the income multiplier to [1].
For the Specified Low-Income Medicare Beneficiary (SLMB) group, set the income multiplier to [1.2].
For the Specified Low-Income Medicare Beneficiary (SLMB) group, set the income multiplier lower bound to [1].
For the Qualifying Individual (QI) group, set the income multiplier to [1.35].
For the Qualifying Individual (QI) group, set the income multiplier lower bound to [1.21].
For the Aged, Blind, and Disabled (ABD) group in [Georgia], set the income multiplier to [0.75], the individual asset limit to [2000], and the couple asset limit to [3000].
For the Older Children (Ages 6-18) group in [Georgia], set the MAGI income multiplier to [1.38] and the funding source to [Medicaid].
For the Young Children (Ages 1-5) group in [Georgia], set the MAGI income multiplier to [1.54] and the funding source to [Medicaid].
For the Parents and Caretaker Relatives group in  [Georgia], set the MAGI income multiplier to [1.38] and the funding source to [Medicaid].

For the Higher-Income Children (CHIP) group in [Georgia], set the MAGI income lower bound multiplier to [1.38] and the MAGI income multiplier to [2.52], minimum age to [0], maximum age to [18], and funding source to [CHIP].
Lisle Ellingsworth assigned to the Parents and Caretaker Relatives eligibility cohort, but does not meet income eligibility requirements.
